kept.title: Chi Chis - 17 Burlington Dr, Dawncliffe, Westville, 3629, So
kept.verdict: Genuine salon interior (styling chairs, mirrors, product shelves) sourced from Fresha listing whose title matches the exact business address — plausibly Chi Chi's own space. Kept, used as hero image.

stock.desc: Black-and-white salon interior — styling chairs, mirrors, product shelving
Woman running hands through long wavy balayage hair against a rose-pink wall
Stylist round-brush blow-drying a client's hair, close-up
Stylist curling a client's hair with a gold curling iron, close-up
Flat-lay of raised hands holding hairdressing tools (brushes, scissors, tint brush, whisk) on a white background
